title: Machine Learning Engineer
education_required: Bachelor's or Master's in Computer Science, Data Science, or related field
job_description: We are seeking a Machine Learning Engineer to design, build, and deploy scalable ML systems. You will work on transformer-based NLP models, fine-tune large language models, and develop end-to-end data pipelines. Responsibilities include model training, hyperparameter tuning, deployment using Docker, and monitoring using MLflow. Experience with AWS and MLOps best practices such as CI/CD and model versioning is highly desirable.
responsibilities: Develop and deploy ML models in production

title: Data Scientist
education_required: Master's in Data Science, Statistics, or related field
job_description: As a Data Scientist, you will analyze large datasets to generate actionable insights. You will build predictive models using machine learning techniques such as Random Forest, Logistic Regression, and XGBoost. You will also develop dashboards and data visualizations to communicate insights to stakeholders.

title: AI Research Engineer
education_required: Master's or PhD in AI, Machine Learning, or related field
job_description: We are hiring an AI Research Engineer to work on cutting-edge computer vision and multimodal AI systems. You will design novel model architectures, conduct experiments, and publish research findings. Experience in large-scale model training and optimization techniques is required.
preferred_qualifications: Published research in top AI conferences

title: MLOps Engineer
education_required: Bachelor's in Computer Science or related field
job_description: We are looking for an MLOps Engineer to streamline the deployment and monitoring of machine learning models. You will implement CI/CD pipelines, manage Kubernetes clusters, and ensure scalable deployment on AWS. Experience with Apache Airflow and model monitoring tools is essential.
responsibilities: Deploy ML models using Docker and Kubernetes

title: NLP Engineer
education_required: Bachelor's or Master's in Computer Science
job_description: We are seeking an NLP Engineer to develop language understanding systems using transformer-based architectures. You will fine-tune BERT and other LLMs, design RAG pipelines, and build APIs for NLP services. Experience with LangChain and FastAPI is a plus.
preferred_qualifications: Experience integrating Gmail or external APIs

title: Full Stack Developer
education_required: Bachelor's in Computer Science or equivalent experience
job_description: We are hiring a Full Stack Developer to build and maintain scalable web applications. You will work with Node.js and Express on the backend, React on the frontend, and MongoDB for database management. Responsibilities include designing REST APIs, implementing authentication, and ensuring responsive UI/UX.
preferred_qualifications: Experience with deployment on AWS or Heroku

title: Embedded Systems Engineer
education_required: Bachelor's in Electronics or Electrical Engineering
job_description: We are looking for an Embedded Systems Engineer to design and develop firmware for microcontroller-based systems. You will work on hardware-software integration, PCB debugging, and real-time signal processing applications. Experience with RTOS and hardware debugging tools is required.
preferred_qualifications: Knowledge of communication protocols (SPI, I2C, UART)

title: Electronics Design Engineer
education_required: Bachelor's or Master's in Electronics Engineering
job_description: We are seeking an Electronics Design Engineer to design and validate analog and digital circuits for industrial applications. You will be responsible for schematic design, PCB layout, simulation using MATLAB, and testing of prototypes. Experience with power electronics and validation methodologies is essential.
